parsed.production_notes: The top half features a 3D animated AI avatar with stylized, cartoonish features and perfectly smooth, slightly unnatural movements. The bottom half is a human recorded on a smartphone camera.

characters.appearance: Young female, fair complexion, wavy red hair, large green eyes. Stylized 3D animated appearance.
characters.wardrobe: White top and gold crescent moon earrings.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, fair complexion, dark hair, and a short beard.
characters.wardrobe: Black t-shirt, clear plastic shower cap, and white wireless earbuds.

scenes.setting: Top: Vanity mirror. Bottom: Room with blue lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is framed from the chest up, resting her chin on her hand. She has wavy red hair, green eyes, and wears a white top with crescent moon earrings. The background shows a vanity mirror lined with round light bulbs.

Character B is framed from the chest up, sitting in a beige chair. He has dark hair, a beard, and wears a black t-shirt, a clear shower cap, and white earbuds. The background is a plain wall illuminated with blue ambient light.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen video with an animated female avatar on top and a real human male on the bottom. They are conversing. A banner of Spanish flags is at the top. Text overlays and checkmarks/crosses appear in the center.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ¿Hablas español? [Do you speak Spanish?]

Character B says: Sí, yo conozco español. [Yes, I know Spanish.]

Character A says: Técnicamente es correcto, pero los hablantes nativos simplemente dicen, hablo español. [Technically it's correct, but native speakers simply say, I speak Spanish.]

Character B says: Hablo español. [I speak Spanish.]

Character A says: ¿Cuántos años tienes? [How old are you?]

Character B says: Soy veinticuatro. [I am twenty-four.]

Character A says: Quieres decir, tengo veinticuatro años. [You mean, I am twenty-four years old.]

Character B says: Tengo veinticuatro años. [I am twenty-four years old.]

Character A says: ¿Cómo te llamas? [What is your name?]

Character B says: Mi nombre es Gustavo. [My name is Gustavo.]

Character A says: Los hablantes nativos normalmente dicen, me llamo Gustavo. [Native speakers normally say, my name is Gustavo.]

Character B says: Me llamo Gustavo. [My name is Gustavo.]

Character A says: Bien hecho. [Well done.]

Character B says: Gracias. ¿Pero quién eres? [Thank you. But who are you?]

Character A says: Soy un tutor de IA en Praktika. Podemos hablar así todos los días para aprender español. [I am an AI tutor on Praktika. We can talk like this every day to learn Spanish.]

Character B says: Pero mi español es muy básico. No puedo hablar. [But my Spanish is very basic. I can't speak.]

Character A says: No te preocupes. Puedo enseñarte en tu lengua materna mientras aprendes español. [Don't worry. I can teach you in your native language while you learn Spanish.]

Character B says: ¿Conoces mi idioma? [Do you know my language?]

Character A says: Claro, soy una IA. [Of course, I am an AI.]

Character B says: Ok, voy a descargar esta aplicación. [Ok, I am going to download this app.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid white background with no other elements.

scenes.visual_description: A white end card showing the app's purple logo, name, and app store download buttons.
